description: Add buildPrReviewPrompt() to src/codex/prompts.ts. Reuses the code-review severity rubric, checklist, and output discipline from buildCodeReviewPrompt. Adds PR-specific checks: does the diff match what the PR description claims, are there files changed that seem unrelated to the stated purpose, is the PR oversized (>500 lines → suggest splitting). Scope-mismatch and description-mismatch surface as regular findings with category `pr-scope` / `pr-description` — NOT top-level result fields, to keep PrReviewResult a simple extension of CodeReviewResult. Config injection matches buildCodeReviewPrompt (user params override config defaults). Truncate PR body to 2000 chars in the prompt.
title: buildPrReviewPrompt builder with PR-specific checks
